reviews.review_msg: JF is a very organized professor, and that usually makes a student's life much easier. His expectations for both the project and the exams are communicated very clearly throughout the course. The content can feel long and dense, so I recommend starting your studying early to avoid falling behind. He also provides constructive and helpful feedback.
Extremely difficult subject, though he tries to make it as accessible as it can get. Still very math heavy and lots of homework, and challenging and long projects.
